projectType.description: DEKE - Domain Expert Knowledge Engine — A self-improving, domain-specific knowledge base that serves as a semantic search backend for LLM services.

codeFormatting.inline: single backtick for short codes and commands
codeFormatting.block: fenced code blocks with language tags

versioning.notes: Only docs/architecture/decisions.md carries a version/decision log. The log records what changed and the reasoning behind it. Git handles version control; the in-document log serves as a decision journal.

authoritativeSources.notes: Link to official external docs rather than restating. Keep DEKE-specific usage patterns in own docs.
